name: Beef Rouladen
recipeIngredient: 8 slices top round steak, 1/4 inch thick
recipeInstructions:
1. Lightly spread mustard on each slice of steak; sprinkle with salt and pepper.
2. Place 1 bacon strip and a few onion wedges on each slice. Roll up and secure with wooden picks.
3. Brown the rolls in a skillet using oil. Drain excess fat.
4. Add broth to the pan; bring to a boil. Reduce heat, cover, and simmer for 1-1/2 hours or until meat is tender. Remove the meat and keep warm.
5. Combine flour and water until smooth. Stir into the remaining broth. Bring to a boil, stirring constantly until thickened and bubbly.
6. Remove wooden picks from the meat and return it to the gravy. Heat through.
7. Sprinkle with parsley if desired.
